text: ’%‘ Government of Western Australia gﬂ Department of the Attorney General A Sheriff's Office Jury Services KIRAN NARULA 15 LAMB ST SOUTH PERTH 6151 TO WHOM IT MAY CONCERN ATTENDANCE CERTIFICATE WEEK COMMENCING 20 FEBRUARY 2017 Thank you KIRAN NARULA for attending jury service.
